narrative:
Swancreek East Two (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,053 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
